Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use Composer Semver for version comparison + fix error message

The hand-rolled version comparison was broken: PHP's version_compare
considers '2.1.39' < '2.1.39.0', causing false failures when the
phar version had fewer segments than the constraint.

Changes:
- Use Composer\Semver\Semver::satisfies() for correct comparison
- Remove broken versionSatisfiesConstraint method
- Fix error message: tell users to 'composer update lts/php-qa-ci'
  instead of reaching inside vendor/

fix: prevent LazyLoadingViolationException in DB model serverStatus attribute

All Standalone* database models accessed destination->server without eager
loading, causing crashes when lazy loading is disabled. Add loadMissing()
before access and use null-safe operators with false fallback.

Fixes: StandalonePostgresql, StandaloneMysql, StandaloneMariadb,
StandaloneRedis, StandaloneMongodb, StandaloneKeydb, StandaloneClickhouse,
StandaloneDragonfly

fix: tighten guardrails across all SDD commands

Guardrails were too positive/informative and got ignored by the model.
Rewrote all guardrails with negative/imperative language ("Nunca X").

Changes across all commands:
- Add "Fonte obrigatoria" principle (claims need [Fonte: url/path:line])
- Add blocking "Checkpoint de Claims" step (gerador-prd, gerador-spec)
- Remove redundant/informative guardrails that repeated the flow
- Rewrite remaining guardrails with "Nunca" constraints
- Expand tool references to include WebFetch/WebSearch alongside Context7

feat(sysinfo): add in-process cache with TTL for dynamic readouts

Static readouts (host, machine, CPU, etc.) cached forever. Dynamic
readouts (CPU load, memory, battery, disk, uptime) use TTL-based
expiry. Subsequent Collect() calls within the same process skip
fetchers for cached keys.

fix: popup 直接呼叫 Chrome API 修復群組列表顯示為 0 的問題

根本原因：popup 透過 sendMessage 與 background service worker 溝通，
但 MV3 的 service worker 可能未及時喚醒，導致回應為 undefined，
群組列表判斷為空直接 return。

修改：
- popup.js 直接呼叫 chrome.tabGroups / chrome.tabs API 查詢與操作
- background.js 精簡為僅負責設定初始化與新視窗自動排序
- 版本號 1.0.0 → 1.0.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: редактирование сделки создавало дубль — showSection сбрасывал editingDealId

При вызове openDealEditor→showSection('create') код внутри showSection
видел editingDealId !== null и вызывал cancelEditMode(), обнуляя ID.
Форма заполнялась данными, но при сабмите editingDealId=null →
шёл POST вместо PUT → дубль сделки.

Убрал сброс editingDealId из showSection — он уже есть в навигации
(строки 1862-1867 в handleNavigation).

commit.message:
Filter keyboard clicks from wake word detection

Increase onset frames from 10 to 20 (~340ms sustained speech required)
and skip captures shorter than 500ms before sending to Whisper. Prevents
keyboard clicks and short impulse sounds from triggering false wake word
detection via Whisper hallucination.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
v0.2.0: Smart content extraction, feed detection, auto-IIFE evaluate

Real-world testing on complex sites (Pikabu, forums, news feeds) revealed
that extraction tools were unreliable: article_text grabbed sidebars,
links returned 1 result, and repeated evaluate calls crashed with
redeclaration errors. This release fixes all of that.

Extraction improvements:
- article_text: content scoring algorithm (text density + paragraph count
  + semantic tag bonuses) replaces brittle hardcoded CSS selectors
- links: smart main area detection with fallback to document.body when
  primary area has < 5 links; deduplication and href filtering
- New feed_items target: auto-detects repeated DOM structures via
  data-attributes and tag+class pattern matching, extracts title/url/
  preview/stats from each item (up to 20)

Browser engine:
- evaluate() auto-wraps expressions with const/let/class in IIFE to
  prevent "already declared" errors on repeated calls

Page intelligence:
- New "feed" page type in classifier with URL patterns (/hot, /trending,
  /feed, known sites), title keywords, and element heuristics
- Content preview (500 chars) added to snapshots for article/feed pages,
  giving agents immediate text context without extra tool calls

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Login page shows TOTP code input screen when mfaRequired
- Trust device checkbox (30 days) on MFA screen
- Security settings: full 2FA setup wizard with QR code, backup codes
- Setup shows QR code + manual key entry for any TOTP app
- Disable 2FA with confirmation code
- Regenerate backup codes with verification
- authService: completeMfaLogin, getMfaStatus, setupMfa, verifyMfaSetup, disableMfa, regenerateBackupCodes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix hobby page: wire up budget filter, add image fallback, remove broken skill filter

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add agent issue detection by assignee as alternative to label filtering

Dispatcher can now detect issues either by Linear label (existing) or by
assignee ID (new). Users pick the mode in project settings via a toggle.
New /linear/members API endpoint provides team member list for the dropdown.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add comprehensive tests and test:avocado script

Add 111 new tests across 4 test files covering branch/edge cases for
report.mjs, config.mjs, cli.mjs, hud.cjs, risograph.cjs, and minimal.cjs.
Add test:avocado script to package.json for CI integration.

Key coverage improvements:
- report.mjs: delta formatting, chart toggles, theme resolution,
  empty history, duration tiers, cloc tiers, local time, table toggles
- config.mjs: preset fallback, malformed JSON, deep merge, custom
  config path, override precedence
- cli.mjs: parseValue, setByPath, hasFlag, buildOverrides with all
  flag combinations
- layouts: hud/risograph/minimal render function, table toggles,
  achievement badges, null data handling, theme variables

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Implement Socket.IO real-time updates, remove 5s polling

- Configure Socket.IO server with room-based events per list
- Client joins/leaves list rooms, listens for items-updated events
- Remove setInterval polling, keep AppState refresh as fallback
- Server emits list-updated/list-deleted on list mutations
- Close join modal after QR scan auto-join

commit.message:
perf(sysinfo): 3.5x speedup with static model map and selective fetching

Replace slow system_profiler SPHardwareDataType call (~90ms) with a static
hw.model lookup table. Use instant CPU load snapshot instead of 200ms sleep.
Refactor Collect() to accept key filter so --show skips unneeded fetchers.

Full readouts: ~700ms → ~200ms. Filtered queries: ~26ms.

Fix deep crawl: use crawled_at instead of deep_crawled_at

The deep_crawled_at column doesn't exist in crawl_results table.
Use existing crawled_at column instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add doctor follow-up invitations, treatment plans & service selection

- Doctor services: configurable per-doctor services with name, price, duration
- Returning patient flow: service selection in booking wizard for repeat visits
- Follow-up invitations: doctors invite patients to follow-up from patients page
  - Support 1-10 session treatment packages with optional discounts
  - Token-based public invitation page with slot picker + Stripe checkout
  - Email notification with full pricing breakdown and doctor's note
- Treatment plans dashboard: patients manage active/completed plans
  - Book subsequent sessions (pre-paid, no charge) via slot picker dialog
  - Progress tracking with visual progress bars
- Stripe webhook: handle invitation checkout payments, confirm first booking
- i18n: full follow_up namespace in en/de/tr/fr with 60+ keys each
- New DB tables: doctor_services, follow_up_invitations with RLS policies
- New UI: Progress component, FollowUpInvitationDialog, BookSessionDialog

commit.message:
Fix publishing: per-site GitHub tokens, no hardcoded repos, add token to onboarding + settings

- Publisher now uses site.githubToken (per-site) instead of global GITHUB_TOKEN env var
- Removed all hardcoded repo owner/name fallbacks (iamheisenburger/App2)
- Added GitHub Personal Access Token field to onboarding wizard
- Added Publishing config section to Settings page (edit existing config)
- Added githubToken + publishing fields to updateSite mutation
- All publishing adapters (GitHub/WordPress/Webhook/Manual) use per-site credentials

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace upstream Python with Rust Wayland implementation

Rewrite from scratch in Rust using the COSMIC zcosmic_toplevel_info_v1
Wayland protocol for event-driven window tracking. Zero polling, single
static binary, ~1MB RSS.

The upstream Python aw-watcher-window is X11-only on Linux. This
implementation works natively on COSMIC desktop via Wayland.

TODO: Add ext-foreign-toplevel-list-v1 support for all Wayland compositors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: aw-watcher-window-cosmic
repository.description: ActivityWatch window watcher for COSMIC desktop — Rust rewrite using Wayland toplevel protocol

Fix: preserve bet365 odds across scans; fix analyzer import on cloud

- push_to_cloud.py: when merging scan results, keep existing bet365_handicaps
  and bet365_url so fetched odds are not overwritten every 5 minutes

Fix progress label color: move text inside fill div so it always sits on orange

orange/green bar — dark text on orange has good contrast, no more
invisible dark-on-dark text.

feat: reduce input tokens with compact vault summary and add retry logic

When RAG is enabled, replace the full vault map (30-40k tokens for large
vaults) with a compact summary (~600 tokens) containing folder tree and
top tags. When RAG is disabled, cap the vault map at 200 notes. Add
exponential backoff retry for 429 rate limit and 529 overloaded errors.
Switch model to Claude Haiku 3.5.
